narrative_paragraphs: John Bates is a TE currently with the Washington Commanders. He entered the NFL in 2021 and has developed into an established presence at the position over 5 seasons.
His strongest season was 2025 with 1.5 half-PPR PPG over 15 games.
Heading into fantasy drafts, John Bates is a roster-depth option at 1.5 PPG. His value is primarily as a handcuff or bye-week fill-in.
